positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic woodland scene. Silhouette of majestic oak trees, glowing with bioluminescent blue and purple accents, intertwining with stylized lunar phases and shooting stars. Incorporate geometric celestial mandalas woven into the forest canopy. The composition should feature a single, prominent crescent moon and a small, glowing path leading into the woods. Style: Clean graphic vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes. Color Palette: Deep indigo, midnight blue, cosmic purple, contrasting with luminous sapphire blue and soft gold accents. Ideal for central placement on apparel. Print-friendly, high contrast, symmetrical layout.
negative: blur, lowres, noisy, watermark, signature, text, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, ugly, dull, monochrome, realistic, photorealistic
